MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE
Kurt Miller,Esq., appeared for defendant and moving party: DeSoto Cab Co.
No other appearance.

RULING:
TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: Defendant De Soto Cab Cooperative Company, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Plaintiff Dexter Mendoza's Attendance At Deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to appear for deposition at a time and place to be noticed by Defendant no sooner than July 3, 2008 and no later than July 11, 2008. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED
